mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is elevated and CPIAUCSL remains sticky, markets infer policy will stay restrictive or tighten further, lifting term premium and pushing the 10-year Treasury yield higher over the next month.
regime_hint: late disinflation with policy still restrictive
failure_condition: Reject if the 10-year yield falls after the trigger in a majority of 20-day windows, or if the signal's average 20-day yield change is not positive by at least 5 bps.

mechanism_narrative: A rising UNRATE together with slowing PAYEMS signals weakening labor demand and higher recession odds, which should pull the 10-year Treasury yield lower over the next 20 trading days through flight-to-quality and easier policy expectations.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.2pp over 2 months or PAYEMS growth turns negative on the latest monthly print
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 20-day yield changes more than 60% of the time, or if the average yield change is non-negative.

mechanism_narrative: Strength in RSAFS indicates resilient nominal consumption demand, which tends to lift growth expectations and inflation compensation, pushing the 10-year Treasury yield higher over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if higher monthly RSAFS growth is not followed by positive 20-day yield changes on average, or if the sign flips consistently for three consecutive quarterly revisions.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in INDPRO alongside weak HOUST signals soft real activity and excess capacity, which reduces inflation pressure and should pull the 10-year Treasury yield lower over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls month-over-month while HOUST is below its prior 3-month average
failure_condition: Reject if simultaneous weakness in INDPRO and HOUST is followed by rising yields in more than half of observed instances, or if the average 20-day yield change is positive.

mechanism_narrative: A downward shift in FEDFUNDS over a multi-month span signals easing policy and lower expected short rates, which should depress the 10-year Treasury yield over a 60-day horizon.
failure_condition: Reject if 60-day yield changes are not negative on average during easing phases, or if the sign is positive after a sequence of at least two monthly rate cuts.

mechanism_narrative: In a late-cycle labor slowdown, simultaneous deterioration in PAYEMS and rise in UNRATE strengthens recession pricing and should lower the 10-year Treasury yield over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint labor deterioration signal does not produce negative 20-day yield changes more often than not, or if its hit rate falls below 40% in rolling 3-year tests.

mechanism_narrative: When GDPC1 accelerates after a weak quarter, markets reprice growth and inflation expectations upward, and the 10-year Treasury yield rises over the following 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarterly growth turns positive after a prior contraction or deceleration
failure_condition: Reject if post-acceleration GDP prints are not followed by higher 60-day yields, or if the average yield change is not positive by at least 10 bps.

mechanism_narrative: During housing-led slowdowns, falling HOUST combined with weak RSAFS signals broad demand softening and lower inflation risk, which should push the 10-year Treasury yield lower within 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls below its 6-month average and RSAFS growth is below its 6-month trend
failure_condition: Reject if the combined housing-demand weakness does not lead to lower yields in a majority of triggered cases, or if the mean 20-day yield change is non-negative.
